01-galaxarium.jpg.alt: The Galaxarium dome in the Wonders of Xandar pavilion with a projected starfield
01-galaxarium.jpg.caption: The Galaxarium — the planetarium-like dome you walk through on the way to the ride. Xandar lore, long before the first car rolls.

02-nova-corps-schiff.jpg.alt: A Nova Corps spaceship in a display case in the Cosmic Rewind queue
02-nova-corps-schiff.jpg.caption: Nova Corps exhibition in the queue: exhibits and a briefing that turn the wait into story — not dead time on your feet.
